name: Peanut Butter'n Honey Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening, honey, and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the well-beaten egg to the mixture. Mix in the peanut butter and salt.
3. Stir in the sifted flour and baking soda mixture until well combined.
4. Form small balls of dough and place them on a greased cookie sheet.
5. Press each ball into a flat circle with a fork.
6. Bake at 350°F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
